name: Archdemon of Bargains
text: Flying, Trample. When this enters, you choose a number from 1 to 5; put that many stickers on permanents this controls. When this leaves play, put that many stickers on permanents you control.

triggers.text: When ~ enters, you choose 1-5: put that many stickers on permanents ~'s controller has.
When ~ leaves play, put N stickers on the opposing player's permanents (N = chosen number).
